item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes the request instead of treating it as another copy change, explicitly recognizes the prior pattern of patch-like information overlays across touchpoints, and moves the owner upstream to information architecture/process guidance. It proposes consolidation into a single pre-visit/FAQ/process entry and sets a boundary against future homepage additions. Although it allows a temporary emergency notice, it does not accept the next overlay as the durable default, so the anti-spiral triage is satisfied."}
